title: Email
description: A regular expression to match a Email.

title: Phone Number
description: A regular expression to match a Phone Number.

languageExamples.python:
import re
regex = re.compile(r"^\+?[1-9]\d{1,14}$")
is_match = bool(regex.search("test_string"))

title: Time 12h
description: A regular expression to match a Time 12h.

languageExamples.python:
import re
regex = re.compile(r"^(1[0-2]|0?[1-9]):[0-5][0-9] (AM|PM|am|pm)$")
is_match = bool(regex.search("test_string"))

title: Zip Code
description: A regular expression to match a Zip Code.

languageExamples.python:
import re
regex = re.compile(r"^\d{5}(?:[-\s]\d{4})?$")
is_match = bool(regex.search("test_string"))

title: Username
description: A regular expression to match a Username.

languageExamples.python:
import re
regex = re.compile(r"^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]{3,16}$")
is_match = bool(regex.search("test_string"))

title: Slug
description: A regular expression to match a Slug.

languageExamples.python:
import re
regex = re.compile(r"^[a-z0-9]+(?:-[a-z0-9]+)*$")
is_match = bool(regex.search("test_string"))

title: Whitespace
description: A regular expression to match a Whitespace.

languageExamples.python:

is_match = bool(regex.search("test_string"))

title: Newline
description: A regular expression to match a Newline.

languageExamples.python:
import re
regex = re.compile(r"\r?\n")
is_match = bool(regex.search("test_string"))

title: File Extension
description: A regular expression to match a File Extension.

languageExamples.python:
import re
regex = re.compile(r"^[\w\-. ]+\.[a-zA-Z0-9]+$")
is_match = bool(regex.search("test_string"))
